provisions.content:
-688-
         MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO DQMINGO.
                       Executive Ord’er No. 534.                              *
             Title:   Appropriation for the completion of the Santo
                      Domingo-Monte Cristy Road.
        By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
    of Santo Domingo, the following Order ^Is hereby dictated and
    promulgated :
I       There is hereby appropriated from funds in the National
    Treasury not otherwise appropriated, the sum of FIVE HUN-
    DRED TEZOUSAND DOLLARS ($500,000.00) towards the
    completion of the Santo Dombngo-Monte Cristi Road.
                                      THOMAS SNOWDEN,
                                    Rear-Admiral, U . S. Navy,
                              Military Governor of Santo Domingo. .
    Santo Domingo City, D.
        September 2, 1920.

         MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO DOMINGO.
                       ExwdivC UTdei- No. 535.

             Title : Appropriation for the 1,urchase
                     of land and building for school
                     purpmes in Seybo, R . D .
                               \
         By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government of
    Santo Domingo, t h e following Order is hereby dictated and
    promulgated :
         Upon recommendation of the Secretaria de Estado d e Jus-
    ticia e Instrucci6n Pfiblica there is hereby appropriated from
    funds in the account “Balances of Public Instruction Funds 1919”
    the suml of FOUR THOUSAND DOLLARS ($4,000) for the
    purchase of land and building located in Seybo, R . D . for school
    purposes.
                                      THOMAS SNOWDEN,
                                    Rear-Admiral, U . S. Navy,
                              Military Governor of Santo Domingo.
    &into DonQngo City, D. R . ,
                                                                         rl
         September 2, 1920.
